project.key_breakthrough: Bubble count error dropped from 100% to 4% by fixing max_det=300 and conf threshold sweeping across 268 warm-started epochs.
lessons_learned: max_det=300 (YOLO default) is a hard ceiling when teacher finds 433 bubbles/image — must raise to 1000.
Optimal conf threshold is 0.15 not 0.05: sweeping across values cut MAE from 115 to 15.7 at same checkpoint.
Warm-starting from prior checkpoints is highly effective — each run adds epochs without repeating pseudolabeling.
dead_ends: val=True during training on MPS triggers a shape-mismatch crash in the YOLO11 assigner; use val=False.
conf=0.05 looked reasonable but caused 3x worse MAE than conf=0.15 on the same trained model.
project.trajectory: Started at MAE=432 (0 detections). Fixed max_det + 169 epochs -> MAE=31. Further 99 epochs + conf sweep -> MAE=15.7 (4%), below the 5% target.
